info.name: Sakan Server API
info.description:
Sakan Server REST API collection ({{baseUrl}}). Includes saved example responses so frontend can see response shapes.

Auth: Most endpoints require Bearer token. After running Verify OTP or Login, the collection will store the token into the collection variable {{token}}.

response.name: 200 OTP sent
200 OTP sent
200 Notifications
200 Marked read
200 List (student example: address masked)

item.name: Create property (landlord, many images multipart)
item.description: Optional images upload on create: use multipart/form-data and repeat key `images` for multiple files. Leave images empty to create without files.

formdata.value: 2 rooms near metro with many photos
